creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for resurrecting these cockroaches and taking maintainership!

A few notes for your future submissions:

- ports-mgmt/portlint can report a variety of problems, it's a good idea to ensure it does not report errors;
- You can set DEVELOPER=yes in /etc/make.conf so that more sanity checks are performed when you update ports.

I fixed the problems reported by these tools.  If you do not understand a change I made, feel free to ask me what happened ;-)
